zh-CN.name: 数字16
zh-CN.intro: 16 是比 15 多 1 的数字。它由 1 和 6 手拉手组成，是一个两位数。我们一起来认识它吧！

story.title: 🎨 16 支小蜡笔
story.body: 小美有一盒新蜡笔，打开数一数：1、2、3……哇，足足有 16 支！红橙黄绿青蓝紫，还有好多漂亮颜色。第 1 支画太阳，第 2 支画小花，第 16 支画彩虹。每支蜡笔排着队，一个接一个，谁也不挤谁。小美用它们画了一幅大大的画，送给妈妈。妈妈说，16 支蜡笔真了不起，把世界都变成彩色的啦！

knowledge.title: 16 有什么特别的？
knowledge.body: 16 是两个 8 加在一起，也是 4 个 4 手拉手。在古代，人们把 16 两算作一斤，所以有“半斤八两”的说法。16 是个整整齐齐的数字。

en.name: Sixteen
en.intro: Sixteen is the number after 15. It has two digits, 1 and 6, holding hands. Let's get to know it!

story.title: 🎨 Sixteen Little Crayons
story.body: Lily has a new box of crayons. She opens it and counts: 1, 2, 3... Wow, there are sixteen! Red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, and many pretty colors. The first draws the sun, the second draws a flower, and the sixteenth draws a rainbow. All the crayons line up nicely, one after another. Lily uses them to draw a big picture for her mom. Mom says, sixteen crayons are amazing—they turn the whole world colorful!

knowledge.title: What is special about 16?
knowledge.body: Sixteen is two 8s together, or four 4s holding hands. Long ago, people used 16 ounces to make one pound. Sixteen is a very neat and tidy number.
